ast.name: title
ast.target: 自托管实时同步测试与结果

ast.name: title
ast.target: 自托管实时同步 - 设置向导

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Some configuration has been arrived, Press

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: to open the config sync dialog , or press elsewhere to dismiss this message.
ast.target: 打开配置同步对话框，或按其他位置以关闭此消息。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to get Obsidian language, defaulting to 'def'
ast.target: 无法获取 Obsidian 语言，已默认为 'def'

ast.name: log
ast.source: Database was made stale, closing handle
ast.target: 数据库已过期，正在关闭句柄

ast.name: log
ast.source: Please note that the indexeddb adapter manages _find indexes itself, therefore it is not using your specified view_adapter
ast.target: 请注意，indexeddb 适配器会自行管理 _find 索引，因此它不使用您指定的 view_adapter

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在应用未跟踪的更改...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在初始化隐藏文件同步...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已启动：数据库 <--> 存储（按修改日期）

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在拆解 LiveSync 管理器...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在拆解 LiveSync 管理器... 完成

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在创建 LiveSync 管理器...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在初始化 LiveSync 管理器...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在搜索已删除的文件..

ast.name: log
ast.source: Remote database updated to incompatible version. update your Self-hosted LiveSync plugin.
ast.target: 远程数据库已更新到不兼容的版本。请更新您的自托管实时同步插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (RegExp) Empty to sync all files. Set filter as a regular expression to limit synchronising files.
ast.target: (正则表达式) 留空以同步所有文件。将过滤器设置为正则表达式以限制同步文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (RegExp) If this is set, any changes to local and remote files that match this will be skipped.
ast.target: （正则表达式）如果设置了此项，任何匹配此模式的本地和远程文件更改都将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Patterns to match files for syncing
ast.target: 用于匹配同步文件的模式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Patterns to match files for overwriting instead of merging
ast.target: 用于匹配文件以进行覆盖而非合并的模式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will recreate chunks for all files. If there were missing chunks, this may fix the errors.
ast.target: 这将为所有文件重新创建数据块。如果存在缺失的数据块，这可能会修复错误。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Resolve all conflicted files by the newer one. Caution: This will overwrite the older one, and cannot resurrect the overwritten one.
ast.target: 通过较新的版本解决所有冲突文件。警告：这将覆盖较旧的版本，且无法恢复被覆盖的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Compare the content of files between on local database and storage. If not matched, you will be asked which one you want to keep.
ast.target: 比较本地数据库和存储中文件的内容。如果不匹配，系统将询问您希望保留哪一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the database adapter to use.
ast.target: 选择要使用的数据库适配器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lock the remote server to prevent synchronization with other devices.
ast.target: 锁定远程服务器以防止与其他设备同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore or reconstruct local database from remote.
ast.target: 从远程恢复或重建本地数据库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rebuild local and remote database with local files.
ast.target: 使用本地文件重建本地和远程数据库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Resend all chunks to the remote.
ast.target: 将所有数据块重新发送到远程。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Initialise journal received history. On the next sync, every item except this device sent will be downloaded again.
ast.target: 初始化日志接收历史记录。在下次同步时，除了本设备发送的项目外，所有项目都将被重新下载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Initialise journal sent history. On the next sync, every item except this device received will be sent again.
ast.target: 初始化日志发送历史记录。在下次同步时，除了本设备接收的项目外，所有项目都将被重新发送。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Perform Garbage Collection to remove unused chunks and reduce database size.
ast.target: 执行垃圾回收以移除未使用的数据块并减小数据库大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reduces storage space by discarding all non-latest revisions. This requires the same amount of free space on the remote server and the local client.
ast.target: 通过丢弃所有非最新版本来减少存储空间。这需要远程服务器和本地客户端具有相同数量的可用空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overwrite remote with local DB and passphrase.
ast.target: 使用本地数据库和密码短语覆盖远程。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Initialise all journal history, On the next sync, every item will be received and sent.
ast.target: 初始化所有日志历史记录。在下次同步时，所有项目都将被接收和发送。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 清除所有下载/上传缓存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete all data on the remote server.
ast.target: 删除远程服务器上的所有数据。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Recreate missing chunks for all files
ast.target: 为所有文件重建缺失的数据块

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Resolve All conflicted files by the newer one
ast.target: 通过较新的版本解决所有冲突文件

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 检查并转换非路径混淆文件

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 删除所有自定义同步数据

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Overwrite Server Data with This Device's Files
ast.target: 用此设备的文件覆盖服务器数据

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 重置日志接收历史记录

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 重置日志发送历史记录

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delete local database to reset or uninstall Self-hosted LiveSync
ast.target: 删除本地数据库以重置或卸载自托管实时同步

ast.name: setText
ast.source: We don't have any history for this note.
ast.target: 我们没有此笔记的任何历史记录。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 切换“立即复制”命令时的同步

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value
%cThe `value` property of a `<select multiple>` element should be an array, but it received a non-array value. The selection will be kept as is.
https://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value
ast.target: %c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value\n%c`<select multiple>` 元素的 `value` 属性应该是一个数组，但它收到了一个非数组值。选择将保持原样。\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是一个组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数只会在第一次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: warn
ast.source: userAgentAppId must be a string or undefined.
ast.target: userAgentAppId 必须是字符串或 undefined。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The provided userAgentAppId exceeds the maximum length of 50 characters.
ast.target: 提供的 userAgentAppId 超过了 50 个字符的最大长度。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: An error was encountered in a non-retryable streaming request.
ast.target: 在不可重试的流式请求中遇到错误。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WeakRef is not supported in this environment. Using a fallback implementation. This may cause memory leaks. Please consider upgrading your browser or Node.js version. If you are on Android, please consider changing your WebView engine to a newer version. It is on the Developer Settings.
ast.target: 此环境不支持 WeakRef。正在使用回退实现。这可能会导致内存泄漏。请考虑升级您的浏览器或 Node.js 版本。如果您使用的是 Android，请考虑将您的 WebView 引擎更改为较新版本。它位于开发者设置中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Missing timestamp format, parsing value with Date constructor:
ast.target: 缺少时间戳格式，正在使用 Date 构造函数解析值：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Missing timestamp format, using epoch seconds
ast.target: 缺少时间戳格式，正在使用纪元秒

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Missing timestamp format, using http date
ast.target: 缺少时间戳格式，正在使用 http 日期

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @smithy/config-resolver WARN - Please use the caller region instead of "*". See "sigv4a" in https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-js-v3/blob/main/supplemental-docs/CLIENTS.md.
ast.target: @smithy/config-resolver 警告 - 请使用调用者区域而不是 \"*\"。请参阅 https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-js-v3/blob/main/supplemental-docs/CLIENTS.md 中的 \"sigv4a\"。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Auto test file found, running tests...
ast.target: 找到自动测试文件，正在运行测试...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Debug info copied to clipboard. You can paste it in the issue. Be careful as it may contain sensitive information, review it before sharing.
ast.target: 调试信息已复制到剪贴板。您可以将其粘贴到问题中。请注意，它可能包含敏感信息，请在分享前进行审查。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Encrypt contents on the remote database. If you use the plugin's synchronization feature, enabling this is recommended.
ast.target: 加密远程数据库上的内容。如果您使用插件的同步功能，建议启用此选项。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, the file properties will be encrypted in the remote database. This is useful for protecting sensitive information in file paths, sizes, and IDs of its chunks. If you are using V1 E2EE, this only obfuscates the file path.
ast.target: 如果启用，文件属性将在远程数据库中加密。这对于保护文件路径、大小及其数据块 ID 中的敏感信息很有用。如果您使用的是 V1 端到端加密，这只会混淆文件路径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, newly created chunks are temporarily kept within the document, and graduated to become independent chunks once stabilised.
ast.target: 如果启用，新创建的数据块将暂时保存在文档内，一旦稳定，将逐步成为独立的数据块。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, chunks will be split into no more than 100 items. However, dedupe is slightly weaker.
ast.target: 如果启用，数据块将被拆分为不超过 100 个项目。但是，去重效果会略有减弱。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The maximum number of chunks that can be incubated within the document. Chunks exceeding this number will immediately graduate to independent chunks.
ast.target: 可以在文档内孵化的数据块的最大数量。超过此数量的数据块将立即成为独立的数据块。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The maximum total size of chunks that can be incubated within the document. Chunks exceeding this size will immediately graduate to independent chunks.
ast.target: 可以在文档内孵化的数据块的最大总大小。超过此大小的数据块将立即成为独立的数据块。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The maximum duration for which chunks can be incubated within the document. Chunks exceeding this period will graduate to independent chunks.
ast.target: 数据块可以在文档内孵化的最长时间。超过此期限的数据块将成为独立的数据块。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled per-filed efficient customization sync will be used. We need a small migration when enabling this. And all devices should be updated to v0.23.18. Once we enabled this, we lost a compatibility with old versions.
ast.target: 如果启用，将使用基于每个文件的高效自定义同步。启用此功能时需要进行一次小型迁移。所有设备都应更新到 v0.23.18。一旦启用此功能，我们将失去与旧版本的兼容性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this enabled, All files are handled as case-Sensitive (Previous behaviour).
ast.target: 如果启用，所有文件将被视为区分大小写（旧行为）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this enabled, all chunks will be stored with the revision made from its content. (Previous behaviour)
ast.target: 如果启用，所有数据块将使用根据其内容生成的版本进行存储。（旧行为）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this enabled, chunks will be split into semantically meaningful segments. Not all platforms support this feature.
ast.target: 如果启用，数据块将被拆分为语义上有意义的段。并非所有平台都支持此功能。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this enabled, JWT will be used for authentication.
ast.target: 如果启用，将使用 JWT 进行身份验证。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The algorithm used for JWT authentication.
ast.target: 用于 JWT 身份验证的算法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The key (PSK in HSxxx in base64, or private key in ESxxx in PEM) used for JWT authentication.
ast.target: 用于 JWT 身份验证的密钥（HSxxx 中的 PSK 为 base64 编码，或 ESxxx 中的私钥为 PEM 格式）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The key ID. this should be matched with CouchDB->jwt_keys->ALG:_`kid`.
ast.target: 密钥 ID。这应与 CouchDB->jwt_keys->ALG:_`kid` 匹配。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Rotation duration of token in minutes. Each generated tokens will be valid only within this duration.
ast.target: 令牌的轮换持续时间（以分钟为单位）。每个生成的令牌仅在此持续时间内有效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The subject for JWT authentication. Mostly username.
ast.target: JWT 身份验证的主题。通常是用户名。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Custom headers for requesting the bucket. e.g. `x-custom-header1: value1
 x-custom-header2: value2`
ast.target: 请求存储桶的自定义标头。例如 `x-custom-header1: value1\n x-custom-header2: value2`

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Custom headers for requesting the CouchDB. e.g. `x-custom-header1: value1
 x-custom-header2: value2`
ast.target: 用于请求 CouchDB 的自定义标头。例如 `x-custom-header1: value1\n x-custom-header2: value2`

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Now we can choose how to split the chunks; V3 is the most efficient. If you have troubled, please make this Default or Legacy.
ast.target: 现在我们可以选择如何分割数据块；V3 是最高效的。如果遇到问题，请将其设置为默认或旧版。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Please use V2, V1 is deprecated and will be removed in the future, It was not a very appropriate algorithm. Only for compatibility V1 is kept.
ast.target: 请使用 V2，V1 已弃用并将被移除，它不是一个非常合适的算法。仅为兼容性而保留 V1。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Application ID for P2P connection. This should be same among your devices. Default is 'self-hosted-livesync' and could not be modified from the UI.
ast.target: 用于 P2P 连接的应用程序 ID。此 ID 应在您的所有设备间保持一致。默认值为 'self-hosted-livesync'，且无法通过用户界面修改。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Nostr relay servers to establish connections for P2P connections. Multiple servers can be separated by commas.
ast.target: 用于建立 P2P 连接的 Nostr 中继服务器。多个服务器可用逗号分隔。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Room ID for P2P connection. This should be same among your devices.
ast.target: 用于 P2P 连接的房间 ID。此 ID 应在您的所有设备间保持一致。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Passphrase for P2P connection. This should be same among your devices.
ast.target: 用于 P2P 连接的密码短语。此短语应在您的所有设备间保持一致。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The TURN servers to use for P2P connections. Multiple servers can be separated by commas.
ast.target: 用于 P2P 连接的 TURN 服务器。多个服务器可用逗号分隔。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The username for the TURN servers.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The credential/password for the TURN servers.
ast.target: TURN 服务器的凭据/密码。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, the plugin will not attempt to connect to the remote database even if the chunk was not found locally.
ast.target: 如果启用，即使本地未找到数据块，插件也不会尝试连接到远程数据库。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically accepts mismatches that are compatible but potentially lossy by comparing tweak modification times.
ast.target: 通过比较调整修改时间，自动接受兼容但可能有损的差异。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Internal timestamp for resolving compatible tweak mismatches.
ast.target: 用于解决兼容调整差异的内部时间戳。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Encryption passphrase. If changed, you should overwrite the server's database with the new (encrypted) files.
ast.target: 加密密码短语。如果更改，您应该用新的（加密的）文件覆盖服务器的数据库。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Disables logging, only shows notifications. Please disable if you report an issue.
ast.target: 禁用日志记录，仅显示通知。如果您要报告问题，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show verbose log. Please enable if you report an issue.
ast.target: 显示详细日志。如果您要报告问题，请启用此选项。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: (Not recommended) If set, credentials will be stored in the file.
ast.target: （不推荐）如果设置，凭据将存储在文件中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This passphrase will not be copied to another device. It will be set to `Default` until you configure it again.
ast.target: 此密码短语不会复制到另一台设备。在您再次配置之前，它将被设置为“默认”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Starts synchronisation when a file is saved.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you save a file in the editor, start a sync automatically
ast.target: 当您在编辑器中保存文件时，自动开始同步。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Forces the file to be synced when opened.
ast.target: 强制在文件打开时进行同步。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically Sync all files when opening Obsidian.
ast.target: 打开 Obsidian 时自动同步所有文件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Move remotely deleted files to the trash, instead of deleting.
ast.target: 将远程删除的文件移至回收站，而不是直接删除。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Should we keep folders that don't have any files inside?
ast.target: 是否保留内部没有任何文件的文件夹？

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Testing only - Resolve file conflicts by syncing newer copies of the file, this can overwrite modified files. Be Warned.
ast.target: 仅用于测试 - 通过同步文件的较新副本来解决文件冲突，这可能会覆盖已修改的文件。请注意。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Should we only check for conflicts when a file is opened?
ast.target: 是否仅在文件打开时检查冲突？

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Should we prompt you about conflicting files when a file is opened?
ast.target: 是否在文件打开时提示您有关冲突文件的信息？

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Should we prompt you for every single merge, even if we can safely merge automatcially?
ast.target: 是否对每次合并都进行提示，即使可以安全地自动合并？

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable this option to automatically apply the most recent change to documents even when it conflicts
ast.target: 启用此选项可在文档冲突时自动应用最新的更改。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Reducing the frequency with which on-disk changes are reflected into the DB
ast.target: 减少磁盘更改反映到数据库的频率。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: (ex. Read chunks online) If this option is enabled, LiveSync reads chunks online directly instead of replicating them locally. Increasing Custom chunk size is recommended.
ast.target: （例如，在线读取数据块）如果启用此选项，LiveSync 将直接在线读取数据块，而不是在本地复制它们。建议增加自定义数据块大小。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: (MB) If this is set, changes to local and remote files that are larger than this will be skipped. If the file becomes smaller again, a newer one will be used.
ast.target: （MB）如果设置，大于此值的本地和远程文件更改将被跳过。如果文件再次变小，将使用较新的版本。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this is set, changes to local files which are matched by the ignore files will be skipped. Remote changes are determined using local ignore files.
ast.target: 如果设置，与忽略文件匹配的本地文件更改将被跳过。远程更改使用本地忽略文件确定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Number of changes to sync at a time. Defaults to 50. Minimum is 2.
ast.target: 一次同步的更改数量。默认为 50。最小值为 2。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Number of batches to process at a time. Defaults to 40. Minimum is 2. This along with batch size controls how many docs are kept in memory at a time.
ast.target: 一次处理的批次数。默认为 40。最小值为 2。此设置与批处理大小共同控制一次在内存中保留的文档数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, PouchDB will hold the connection open for 60 seconds, and if no change arrives in that time, close and reopen the socket, instead of holding it open indefinitely. Useful when a proxy limits request duration but can increase resource usage.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，PouchDB 将保持连接打开 60 秒，如果在此时间内没有更改到达，则关闭并重新打开套接字，而不是无限期保持打开。当代理限制请求持续时间时很有用，但可能会增加资源使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Stop reflecting database changes to storage files.
ast.target: 停止将数据库更改反映到存储文件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Warning! This will have a serious impact on performance. And the logs will not be synchronised under the default name. Please be careful with logs; they often contain your confidential information.
ast.target: 警告！这将对性能产生严重影响。并且日志不会以默认名称同步。请小心处理日志；它们通常包含您的机密信息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before v0.17.16, we used an old adapter for the local database. Now the new adapter is preferred. However, it needs local database rebuilding. Please disable this toggle when you have enough time. If leave it enabled, also while fetching from the remote database, you will be asked to disable this.
ast.target: 在 v0.17.16 之前，我们使用旧的本地数据库适配器。现在推荐使用新的适配器。但是，它需要重建本地数据库。请在您有足够时间时禁用此开关。如果保持启用，在从远程数据库获取数据时，系统也会要求您禁用它。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 在复制前扫描自定义设置。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 每 1 分钟扫描一次自定义设置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Notify when other device has newly customized.
ast.target: 当其他设备有新的自定义设置时通知。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable this if your Object Storage doesn't support CORS
ast.target: 如果您的对象存储不支持 CORS，请启用此选项。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Save settings to a markdown file. You will be notified when new settings arrive. You can set different files by the platform.
ast.target: 将设置保存到 Markdown 文件。当有新设置到达时，您会收到通知。您可以按平台设置不同的文件。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: （已过天数，0 表示禁用自动删除）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: LiveSync could not handle multiple vaults which have same name without different prefix, This should be automatically configured.
ast.target: LiveSync 无法处理具有相同名称但没有不同前缀的多个保险库，这应该会自动配置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Unique name between all synchronized devices. To edit this setting, please disable customization sync once.
ast.target: 所有同步设备之间的唯一名称。要编辑此设置，请先禁用自定义同步。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Not all messages have been translated. And, please revert to "Default" when reporting errors.
ast.target: 并非所有消息都已翻译。并且，报告错误时请恢复为“默认”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If disabled(toggled), chunks will be split on the UI thread (Previous behaviour).
ast.target: 如果禁用（切换），数据块将在 UI 线程上分割（旧行为）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, the file under 1kb will be processed in the UI thread.
ast.target: 如果启用，小于 1kb 的文件将在 UI 线程中处理。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Seconds. Saving to the local database will be delayed until this value after we stop typing or saving.
ast.target: 秒。在我们停止输入或保存后，保存到本地数据库将延迟到此值之后。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Saving will be performed forcefully after this number of seconds.
ast.target: 在此秒数后将强制执行保存。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, efficient per-file customization sync will be used. A minor migration is required when enabling this feature, and all devices must be updated to v0.23.18. Enabling this feature will result in losing compatibility with older versions.
ast.target: 如果启用，将使用高效的按文件自定义同步。启用此功能需要进行少量迁移，并且所有设备必须更新到 v0.23.18。启用此功能将导致与旧版本不兼容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this enabled, all chunks will be stored with the revision made from its content.
ast.target: 如果启用，所有数据块将使用根据其内容生成的修订版进行存储。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While enabled, it causes very performance impact but debugging replication testing and other features will be enabled. Please disable this if you have not read the source code. Requires restart of Obsidian.
ast.target: 启用时，会导致非常大的性能影响，但会启用复制测试和其他功能的调试。如果您没有阅读过源代码，请禁用此选项。需要重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, the notification of hidden files change will be suppressed.
ast.target: 如果启用，将抑制隐藏文件更改的通知。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The minimum interval for automatic synchronisation on event.
ast.target: 事件触发自动同步的最小间隔。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, the request API will be used to avoid `inevitable` CORS problems. This is a workaround and may not work in all cases. PLEASE READ THE DOCUMENTATION BEFORE USING THIS OPTION. This is a less-secure option.
ast.target: 如果启用，将使用请求 API 来避免“不可避免的”CORS 问题。这是一种变通方法，可能并非在所有情况下都有效。使用此选项前请务必阅读文档。这是一个安全性较低的选项。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, the ⛔ icon will be shown inside the status instead of the file warnings banner. No details will be shown.
ast.target: 如果启用，⛔ 图标将显示在状态栏内，而不是文件警告横幅中。不会显示详细信息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How to display network errors when the sync server is unreachable.
ast.target: 当同步服务器不可达时，如何显示网络错误。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Effectively a directory. Should end with `/`. e.g., `vault-name/`.
ast.target: 实际上是一个目录。应以 `/` 结尾。例如，`vault-name/`。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You can enable this setting to process the files with size mismatches, these files can be created by some APIs or integrations.
ast.target: 您可以启用此设置来处理大小不匹配的文件，这些文件可能由某些 API 或集成创建。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, the forcePathStyle option will be used for bucket operations.
ast.target: 如果启用，将对存储桶操作使用 forcePathStyle 选项。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, changes will be automatically broadcasted to all connected peers. Notified peers will start fetching the changes.
ast.target: 如果启用，更改将自动广播到所有已连接的对等方。收到通知的对等方将开始获取更改。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, the P2P connection will be automatically started when the application launches.
ast.target: 如果启用，应用程序启动时将自动启动 P2P 连接。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Files with modification times greater than this value (in seconds since the Unix epoch) will not have their events reflected. Set to 0 to disable this limit.
ast.target: 修改时间大于此值（自 Unix 纪元以来的秒数）的文件将不会反映其事件。设置为 0 可禁用此限制。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please set device name to identify this device. This name should be unique among your devices. While not configured, we cannot enable this feature.
ast.target: 请设置设备名称以标识此设备。此名称应在您的设备中保持唯一。在未配置之前，我们无法启用此功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: We cannot change the device name while this feature is enabled. Please disable this feature to change the device name.
ast.target: 此功能启用期间，我们无法更改设备名称。请禁用此功能以更改设备名称。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you reached the payload size limit when using IBM Cloudant, please decrease batch size and batch limit to a lower value.
ast.target: 如果您在使用 IBM Cloudant 时达到有效负载大小限制，请将批处理大小和批处理限制降低到更低的值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The IndexedDB adapter often offers superior performance in certain scenarios, but it has been found to cause memory leaks when used with LiveSync mode. When using LiveSync mode, please use IDB adapter instead.
ast.target: IndexedDB 适配器在某些场景下通常能提供更优的性能，但已发现其在与 LiveSync 模式一起使用时会导致内存泄漏。使用 LiveSync 模式时，请改用 IDB 适配器。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changing this setting requires migrating existing data (a bit time may be taken) and restarting Obsidian. Please make sure to back up your data before proceeding.
ast.target: 更改此设置需要迁移现有数据（可能需要一些时间）并重启 Obsidian。请确保在继续之前备份您的数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: I've made a backup, mark this device 'resolved'
ast.target: 我已备份，将此设备标记为“已解决”

ast.name: text
ast.source: To prevent unwanted vault corruption, the remote database has been locked for synchronization. (This device is marked 'resolved') When all your devices are marked 'resolved', unlock the database. This warning kept showing until confirming the device is resolved by the replication
ast.target: 为防止意外的保险库损坏，远程数据库已被锁定以进行同步。（此设备被标记为“已解决”）当您所有设备都被标记为“已解决”后，请解锁数据库。此警告将持续显示，直到通过复制确认设备已解决。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 我已准备好，解锁数据库

ast.name: text
ast.source: To stop the countdown, tap anywhere on the dialogue
ast.target: 要停止倒计时，请点击对话框上的任意位置

ast.source: I am setting this up for the first time
ast.target: 我正在首次设置此功能

ast.source: I am adding a device to an existing synchronisation setup
ast.target: 我正在向现有同步设置中添加设备

ast.name: title
ast.source: Scan a QR Code (Recommended for mobile)
ast.target: 扫描二维码（推荐用于移动设备）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Setup Complete: Preparing to Initialise Server
ast.target: 设置完成：准备初始化服务器

ast.name: title
ast.source: Setup Complete: Preparing to Fetch Synchronisation Data
ast.target: 设置完成：准备获取同步数据

ast.name: title
ast.source: I am setting up a new server for the first time / I want to reset my existing server.
ast.target: 我正在首次设置新服务器 / 我想重置现有服务器。

ast.name: title
ast.source: My remote server is already set up. I want to join this device.
ast.target: 我的远程服务器已设置好。我想加入此设备。

ast.name: title
ast.source: The remote is already set up, and the configuration is compatible (or got compatible by this operation).
ast.target: 远程已设置好，且配置兼容（或通过此操作变得兼容）。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 检测并修复 CouchDB 问题

ast.name: title
ast.source: The files in this Vault are almost identical to the server's.
ast.target: 此保险库中的文件与服务器上的文件几乎相同。

ast.name: title
ast.source: This Vault is empty, or contains only new files that are not on the server.
ast.target: 此保险库为空，或仅包含服务器上没有的新文件。

ast.name: title
ast.source: There may be differences between the files in this Vault and the server.
ast.target: 此保险库中的文件与服务器上的文件可能存在差异。

ast.name: title
ast.source: I have created a backup of my Vault.
ast.target: 我已创建了我的保险库的备份。

ast.name: title
ast.source: I understand the risks and will proceed without a backup.
ast.target: 我了解风险，并将在没有备份的情况下继续。

ast.name: title
ast.source: I am unable to create a backup of my Vault.
ast.target: 我无法创建我的保险库的备份。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 阻止从服务器获取配置

ast.name: title
ast.source: Final Confirmation: Overwrite Server Data with This Device's Files
ast.target: 最终确认：用此设备的文件覆盖服务器数据

ast.name: title
ast.source: I understand that all changes made on other smartphones or computers possibly could be lost.
ast.target: 我理解在其他智能手机或电脑上所做的所有更改可能会丢失。

ast.name: title
ast.source: I understand that other devices will no longer be able to synchronise, and will need to be reset the synchronisation information.
ast.target: 我理解其他设备将无法再同步，并且需要重置同步信息。

ast.name: title
ast.source: I understand that this action is irreversible once performed.
ast.target: 我理解此操作一旦执行将不可逆转。

ast.name: title
ast.source: I am unable to create a backup of my Vaults.
ast.target: 我无法创建我的保险库的备份。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 所有设备都已同步了吗？

ast.name: title
ast.source: Select a peer to fetch from
ast.target: 选择要从中获取的对等方
